draft_text: Some people talk about splitting our nation; we stand with the constitution and unity—let’s inform with facts.
Our communities deserve stability and progress across Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and all provinces.
Rumors divide; truth unites. Verify before you share.
We push back against divisive narratives by amplifying development and rights for all citizens.

column3: respectful dialogue is our path; no room for incitement or hate.

draft_text: Let’s highlight stories of cooperation among provinces and cultures.
